candidate.name: Sample Solutions Engineer
candidate.cvText:
Senior Solutions Engineer at MongoDB
Seattle, WA
8 years presales; deep technical discovery, POCs, value engineering.

Senior Solutions Engineer · MongoDB · Seattle, WA
- Pre-sales support for $40M ARR territory; supported 12 AEs across mid-market and enterprise
- Proof of concept design, technical discovery, sandbox builds, RFP responses
- Solutions architect for strategic accounts: Boeing, Costco, Microsoft
- Value engineering, business case development, ROI modeling, technical demos
- Solutions consultant, technical champion development, MEDDIC qualification
- Tools: AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform, REST APIs, Postman
- Pre-sales / presales / solution engineering; technical evaluation, integration design
knownIssues: rolepulse role_type='presales' → cv-pulse roleHint not in ALL_ROLES → defaults to AE rubric. CV has strong presales/SE keywords (solutions engineer, presales, pre-sales, proof of concept, solutions architect, technical discovery, sandbox, value engineer, technical evaluation, solutions consultant) so detectRole should return 'SE' from CV cleanly.

jobs.title: Implementation Manager
